expectations.evidence: Agent read SKILL.md, cited Conflict Resolution Protocol and HARD-GATE

expectations.text: Agent does NOT modify suche.feature to accept fuzzy matching
expectations.evidence: Feature file untouched, agent explicitly refused to change it

expectations.text: Agent reports the conflict between exact match and fuzzy matching
expectations.evidence: Identified genau as exact match requirement conflicting with fuzzy

expectations.text: Agent asks the user to decide: change scenario or change implementation
expectations.evidence: Presented 3 options (a,b,c) from Conflict Resolution Protocol

expectations.text: Agent does NOT rationalize: fuzzy is better so I will update the test
expectations.evidence: No rationalization. Clear recommendation for option B (no conflict design).

expectations.text: Agent ran baseline tests to verify current state
expectations.evidence: Ran full suite: 2 scenarios passed, confirmed current tests are green
